name: @formio/convex-api
description: Shared Convex backend (schema + functions) and generated API surface for all Formio frontends.

scripts.version: npm run gen:api && npm run typecheck && git add api.ts
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run deploy && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run deploy && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run deploy && git push --follow-tags
